contextual.title: Temperature Skin Check After Cryotherapy Application
contextual.text:
Summary: The aim of this study was to reheat the skin in different ethnic groups after application of cryotherapy.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 belong to ethnic groups requested 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 suffering any change in skin sensitivity, illness of an infectious nature or previously diagnosed diseases that respond negatively to the use of cold
